title: EasyShieldBreak
description: A simple Mod which allows you to break Shields easly
body:
EasyShieldBreak is a lightweight and intuitive Minecraft mod that makes shield combat more dynamic and balanced. Instead of repetitive encounters where shields dominate every fight, this mod introduces a simple mechanic that causes shields to break more easily under heavy damage. By modifying durability loss and hit impact, EasyShieldBreak encourages smarter timing, better positioning, and more skill-based combat in both PvP and PvE.

The mod fits seamlessly into vanilla and modded gameplay, adding a fresh strategic layer without overcomplicating combat. It is ideal for players who want faster, more engaging battles and a smoother combat flow.
Important: Because this mod changes combat behavior, some multiplayer servers may consider it unfair or unauthorized. Using EasyShieldBreak on certain servers can be bannable, so always check server rules before joining.
